summary: To treat proton movement by MC simulation and to treat Fo's c-ring motor rotation by MD simulation.
title: Molecular dynamics simulation of proton-transfer coupled rotations in ATP synthase FO motor

summary: Gillespie algorithm revealed the reason why dynein take several step, such as Hand-over-hand, inchworm, non-alternative step, backstep.
title: How cytoplasmic dynein couples ATP hydrolysis cycle to diverse stepping motions: kinetic modeling

summary: PACRG and FAP20 play an important role for binding B10 to A-MT
title: The inner junction complex of the cilia is an interaction hub that involves tubulin post-translational modifications

summary: How MIPs controled stiffness of microtubule.
title: Tubulin lattice in cilia is in a stressed form regulated by microtubule inner proteins

summary: Dynein motor-domain have Linker, AAA+ ring(AAA1~AAA6), stalk & MTBD, and C-terminal end. In this paper, we understand the conformational change pathway of power-stroke/recovery-stroke event.
title: Allosteric conformational change cascade in cytoplasmic dynein revealed by structure-based molecular simulations
